heading: Infrastructure development
label: 519 Infrastructure development
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2015 Amendment note under , Government Organization and Employees.Oct. 1, 2015section 1003 of Pub. L. 114–94section 5313 of Title 5

children.text: shall be used primarily for the development of intelligent transportation system infrastructure, equipment, and systems; and

to the maximum extent practicable, shall not be used for the construction of physical surface transportation infrastructure unless the construction is incidental and critically necessary to the implementation of an intelligent transportation system project.
